_note: Label Sprint round for bacteriophage — generated bacteriophage_illus.webp, cropped/keyed dark mode.
caption: Tap each label, then tap where it belongs on the bacteriophage.

hotspots.label: Head (capsid)
hotspots.detail: The polyhedral protein coat enclosing the viral genetic material.

hotspots.label: DNA (genetic material)
hotspots.detail: The tightly coiled viral genome packed inside the head.

hotspots.label: Collar
hotspots.detail: A narrow neck connecting the head to the tail.

hotspots.label: Sheath
hotspots.detail: The contractile protein tube of the tail; contracts to inject DNA.

hotspots.label: Base plate
hotspots.detail: The hexagonal plate at the base of the tail, anchoring the tail fibres.

hotspots.label: Tail fibres
hotspots.detail: Thin projections that attach the phage to a bacterial cell surface.
